description: Defines the article purpose and reader promise: How readers move through complex knowledge systems over time.
Connects the article to reader jobs, pains, gains, questions, or decision needs.
Checks whether claims, examples, references, caveats, and interpretive limits support the article.
Assesses whether code, data, outputs, documentation, and generated assets support reuse.
Assesses title, opening, section sequence, examples, internal links, and next-step clarity.
Flags metadata freshness, link integrity, evidence review, repository status, and conceptual drift.
